description: GIVEN a user has launched the MLB.tv app

steps.action:
WHEN a user is on the Home page

AND non-Game content is displayed in the Hero/Featured space
steps.result:
THEN the featured content image is displayed on the right 2/3 of the screen

AND the featured content image has a white border around the image indicating focus

AND the featured content image does not have a gradient applied

AND the featured content title is displayed in bold letters to the left of the featured image, below the navigation header buttons

AND the featured content description is displayed below the featured content title, to the left of the featured image

(see attached screenshot for reference)
